title: Solve Problems Using Data
essential_question: How can you solve problems using data shown in bar graphs and picture graphs?
strategies: Add to find totals or combined amounts
Use 'did not choose' = total minus that category

vertical_alignment.prerequisite: G2 — 막대그래프·그림그래프에서 데이터 읽기; 단순 비교
vertical_alignment.current: G3 — 축척 막대그래프에서 '몇 명 더/적은', '합쳐서', '선택 안 함' 문제 풀기
vertical_alignment.successor: G4 — 다양한 표현(막대·꺾은선·표)에서 다단계 문제 풀기

learn.title: Solving 'How Many More / Fewer'
learn.content: Find the values for the two categories being compared. Subtract the smaller from the larger. The result tells you 'how many more' or 'how many fewer.'

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.2 Lesson 2.6 'Solve Problems Using Data' pp.85-88
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 6 — Scaled Bar Graphs Teacher Edition
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Solving 'How Many in All' or 'Combined'
learn.content: Add the values of the categories mentioned. If the question says 'in all,' add every category. If it says 'combined' for specific categories, add only those.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.2 Lesson 2.6 'Solve Problems Using Data' pp.85-88
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 6 — Scaled Bar Graphs Teacher Edition
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Solving 'Did Not Choose'
learn.content: First find the total (add all categories). Then subtract the category mentioned. Total − category = number who did NOT choose it.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.2 Lesson 2.6 'Solve Problems Using Data' pp.85-88
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 6 — Scaled Bar Graphs Teacher Edition
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 단계별 가이드: '몇 명 더 많은가' 풀기
learn.content: 데이터: 고양이 9, 강아지 15, 물고기 6. '강아지가 고양이보다 몇 명 더 많이 선택?' 1단계: 두 값 찾기 — 강아지=15, 고양이=9. 2단계: 큰 값 − 작은 값 = 15 − 9 = 6. 답: 6명 더 많음.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.2 Lesson 2.6 'Solve Problems Using Data' pp.85-88
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 6 — Scaled Bar Graphs Teacher Edition
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 단계별 가이드: '선택하지 않은' 인원 풀기
learn.content: 데이터: 미술 8, 음악 12, 체육 10. '음악을 선택하지 않은 학생 수는?' 1단계: 전체 합계 = 8+12+10 = 30. 2단계: 전체 − 음악 = 30 − 12 = 18. 답: 18명. 실수 주의: 전체(30)를 정답으로 쓰지 말 것.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.2 Lesson 2.6 'Solve Problems Using Data' pp.85-88
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 6 — Scaled Bar Graphs Teacher Edition
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 특정 범주만 더하기
learn.content: 데이터: 빨강 10, 파랑 8, 노랑 4, 초록 6. '빨강 또는 노랑을 선택한 학생 수?' → 빨강(10) + 노랑(4) = 14. 전체 합계(10+8+4+6=28)를 사용하지 않는다. 핵심: 질문에 나온 범주만 더한다.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.2 Lesson 2.6 'Solve Problems Using Data' pp.85-88
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 6 — Scaled Bar Graphs Teacher Edition
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 수학 토크: '몇 명 더' vs '합쳐서 몇 명'
learn.content: 데이터: 축구 14, 농구 8, 테니스 6. Q1: '축구가 테니스보다 몇 명 더?' → 빼기: 14−6=8. Q2: '축구와 농구 합쳐서 몇 명?' → 더하기: 14+8=22. 키워드: '더 많은/적은' → 뺄셈. '합쳐서/총' → 덧셈.
learn.question: 농구와 테니스를 합쳐서 몇 명인가요?
hints: '합쳐서'는 더하기입니다.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.2 Lesson 2.6 'Solve Problems Using Data' pp.85-88
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 6 — Scaled Bar Graphs Teacher Edition
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: L6 핵심 정리
learn.content: 막대그래프 문제 풀기 4가지 전략: 1. '몇 명 더 많은/적은' → 큰 값 − 작은 값 (뺄셈). 2. '합쳐서/또는' → 해당 범주만 더하기. 3. '전체/모두' → 모든 범주 더하기. 4. '선택하지 않은' → 전체 − 해당 범주.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.2 Lesson 2.6 'Solve Problems Using Data' pp.85-88
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 6 — Scaled Bar Graphs Teacher Edition
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: Bar graph: Class A = 18 books, Class B = 24 books, Class C = 12 books. Class A and Class C want to beat Class B's total together. How many more books do they need?
choices: A. None, they already beat it
practice_r3.explanation: A+C = 18+12 = 30. B = 24. 30 > 24, they already beat it.

practice_r3.question: 막대그래프: A반 18, B반 24, C반 12. 각 반이 25권에 도달하려면 더 읽어야 하는 책이 있다. 세 반이 추가로 읽어야 할 책은 총 몇 권인가요?
hints: 각 반이 25권에서 부족한 양을 구하세요.
A반=7, B반=1, C반=13. 모두 더하면?
